design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed=hash('Order food with AI|use_case|food ordering audience|2026-07-06T11:26:03Z') -> hero=workflow-command-center, typography=Cabinet Grotesk, components=[workflow-playbook-timeline, gapless-bento-grid, source-card-dossier], GSAP=[image-scale-fade-scroll, hover-physics]. AIDA Check: hero grabs attention, proof builds interest, cache advantage builds desire, CTA closes. Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk verified. Hero Math Verification: clamp headline 2–3 lines max-width 1100px. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded CDN load with fallbacks. Label Sweep & Button Check: black primary CTA, white secondary CTA, contrast AA+.
headline: Order food with AI — a personal agent that actually handles the apps

site_brief.audience: people who want an AI assistant to order meals, groceries, and delivery without babysitting apps
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Order food with AI', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful. Add a long-form operator playbook with how-to steps, setup checklist, realistic limits, confirmation moments, and examples that a reader can act on immediately.
queries: computer use AI agent ordering food
site_brief.title: Order food with AI
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can coordinate food ordering across delivery apps, preferences, addresses, payment confirmation, and repeat orders

summary: A practical field guide showing how Super can order meals, groceries, and delivery across real websites and apps, reuse a computer-use cache for repeat orders, and reduce the need to babysit food apps.
